results.evidence: parseSource() in source-resolver.ts:25-72 returns typed discriminated union for all source prefixes. 14 tests pass.
fetchRegistry() in source-fetcher.ts:44-58 delegates to getSkill(); test at source-fetcher.test.ts:67-82
fetchGitHubFlat() in source-fetcher.ts:63-86 fetches from raw.githubusercontent.com; test at source-fetcher.test.ts:94-126
fetchPlugin() in source-fetcher.ts:91-159 re-fetches via Trees API for plugin-dir sources; test at source-fetcher.test.ts:130-173
marketplace type routes to same fetchPlugin(); test at source-fetcher.test.ts:190-223
update.ts:97-101 checks parsed.type=local and continues with skip message; test at update.test.ts:209-233
update.ts:104-122 falls back to getSkill() when fetchFromSource returns null for non-local; test at update.test.ts:184-207
computeSha() in source-fetcher.ts:38 produces 12-char SHA-256; compared in update.ts:135
update.ts:136-138 logs dim 'already up to date' on SHA match; test at update.test.ts:235-249
update.ts:140-142 prints bold(name) with dim(old) -> green(new) SHA format
update.ts:181-188 spreads entry and updates sha/version/tier/installedAt; test at update.test.ts:261-269
update.ts:145 calls runTier1Scan(result.content); test at update.test.ts:251-259
update.ts:156-159 continues without writing on FAIL verdict; test at update.test.ts:251-259
update.ts:152-154 prints verdictColor(verdict) + score for every scanned skill
local sources continue at update.ts:100 before reaching scan at line 145
update.ts:190-196 catch block prints yellow(name) + dim(err.message)
try/catch wraps loop body; catch continues to next iteration
update.ts:199 writeLockfile(lock) called once after for loop; test at update.test.ts:271-293
buildAuthHeader() in source-fetcher.ts:21-25 reads GITHUB_TOKEN and adds Authorization header
update.ts:201-203 reports updated count; individual failures printed inline during loop
fetchPlugin() in source-fetcher.ts:113-128 uses Trees API with recursive=1 to discover skill paths
source-fetcher.ts:139-147 fetches all skill files in parallel; combined content returned for scan+write
source-fetcher.ts:150-153 sorts by path and computes SHA from combined content
Implementation only adds/updates; no deletion logic for removed upstream skills

findings.title: Plugin-dir update writes combined content to single file instead of per-skill subdirectories
findings.issue: For pluginDir sources, the fetcher concatenates all sub-skill contents into a single string. update.ts writes this to {agent}/{pluginName}/SKILL.md. But install creates separate files at {agent}/{pluginName}/{skillName}/SKILL.md per sub-skill. Update doesn't overwrite the correct files.
findings.suggestion: Extend FetchResult with optional skills array: { name: string; content: string }[]. When present, update.ts writes each to its own subdirectory matching install layout.
findings.impact: After update on a plugin-dir source, combined SKILL.md appears at plugin root while old individual files remain. SHA change detection still works. Not data loss but file layout mismatch. Tracked as follow-up improvement.
